message:
test(fcp-conformance/host-supervisor-lifecycle): pin ShutdownCoordinator + HealthCheckScheduler + ResourceLimits + ConnectionTracker contract (resolves flywheel_connectors-136qs)

33 tests complementing TEST-CONFORMANCE-52 to cover the second half
of the supervisor module — graceful shutdown sequencing, health
scheduling, resource ceilings, drain-aware connection tracking.

- ShutdownPhase state machine: NotStarted→GracefulWait (start_graceful
  is idempotent, MUST NOT overwrite sent_at)→ForceKill (only from
  GracefulWait; record_force_kill on NotStarted is no-op)→Complete
  (record_exit). is_shutting_down ⇔ {GracefulWait, ForceKill};
  is_complete ⇔ Complete.
- should_force_kill: ≥ boundary (inclusive at exact timeout, NOT
  strict >); false in non-GracefulWait phases.
- HealthCheckScheduler: is_due true on first call (no last_check),
  true after interval elapses; record_success resets consecutive
  failures; is_unhealthy ⇔ failures ≥ max (default 3, configurable
  via with_max_failures); time_until_next saturates at zero (no
  underflow when overdue).
- ResourceLimits::default: 512 MiB memory + 1024 fds + 64 processes
  (cpu_seconds + max_file_size unset); ::unlimited() all None;
  has_any_limits + active_limit_count agree.
- merge_strict: min(Some, Some); Some|None → Some; None|None → None.
- ResourceUsage::violations: STRICT > limit (at-limit NOT a
  violation); one ResourceViolation per exceeded resource; unlimited
  limits skip violations even at u64::MAX usage.
- ResourceKind Display + serde snake_case (memory / cpu_time /
  file_descriptors / processes / file_size).
- ResourceViolation Display includes keyword + current + limit.
- ConnectionTracker: starts idle; try_acquire grants pre-drain,
  rejects post-start_drain; ConnectionGuard Drop decrements;
  is_drained ⇔ draining AND active=0 (MUST wait for active to clear).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
